page.title: Dubhe: Best Budget Day Boat in Marbella for a Small-Group Afternoon

data.meta_description: Dubhe: cheapest day boat in Marbella. 8m boat, 5 pax, from €230/2h from Puerto Banús — the lowest-priced charter in our fleet. Book your afternoon now.
data.summary: Dubhe is the cheapest boat in our Marbella fleet, perfect for small groups wanting a simple, affordable afternoon on the water. This 8m day boat departs Puerto Banús, holds 5 passengers, and starts at €230 for 2 hours (fuel not included).
key_facts: Cheapest charter in Puerto Banús — from €230 for 2 hours
Fuel not included (typically €30–€60 depending on route)
Drinks, snacks, insurance and 21% IVA included
Ideal for a short afternoon escape along the Marbella coast
Top speed approx 25-30 knots (4-stroke outboard engine)
Book via WhatsApp for availability and longer durations

faq.q: Do I need a boat licence to drive the Dubhe?
faq.a: The Dubhe is 8 metres, which is above Spain's 5 m licence-free limit, so a valid boating licence (PNB/PER, ICC or RYA Day Skipper) is needed to take the helm. No licence? Message us on WhatsApp and we will arrange a skippered departure.

faq.q: How many people can the Dubhe take?
faq.a: The Dubhe has a maximum capacity of 5 passengers including the driver. It is an 8-metre boat, perfect for a small group of friends or family.

faq.q: What is included in the price for the Dubhe?
faq.a: Every charter includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Fuel is not included on the Dubhe (typically €30–€60 depending on route). Prices start at €230 for 2 hours.

faq.q: Where does the Dubhe depart from?
faq.a: The Dubhe departs from Puerto Banús, the iconic marina in Marbella. You'll meet us at the dock and we'll get you on the water quickly.

faq.q: Can I extend the charter beyond 2 hours?
faq.a: Yes, longer durations are available. You can book for half-day or full-day trips. Contact us via WhatsApp for pricing and availability for longer hire.

faq.q: What areas can I visit with the Dubhe?
faq.a: You can explore the Marbella coastline, including the Golden Mile, Cabopino, and even head towards Estepona. The boat is nimble and ideal for coastal cruising. Always stay within safe navigation limits.

faq.q: Is there a minimum age to drive the Dubhe?
faq.a: You must be at least 18 years old to take the helm, sign a waiver and provide a valid ID plus a valid boating licence. Skippered departures are available on request.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad?
faq.a: Your safety is our priority. If weather conditions are unsafe, we will reschedule your booking or offer a full refund. We monitor forecasts closely before every departure.

data.body_html:
If you want the cheapest way onto the water on the Marbella coast, the Dubhe is the boat to look at. At 8 metres long and seating up to 5 people, this compact day boat departs from Puerto Banús and starts at €230 for 2 hours (fuel not included, typically €30–€60 depending on route). No big-yacht price tag — just you, the sea, and the Costa del Sol sun.

Why the Dubhe is the best budget day boat in Marbella

The Dubhe is the lowest-priced hull in our fleet — €230 for 2 hours versus €749 on the 12.5 m yachts. While boats like the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 are bigger skippered charters, the Dubhe keeps things small and simple. Note that at 8 metres it sits above Spain's 5 m licence-free limit, so bring a valid boating licence (PNB/PER, ICC or RYA Day Skipper) if you want the helm, or ask us about a skippered departure.

Dubhe boat specifications at a glance

  • Length: 8 metres
  • Capacity: 5 passengers (including driver)
  • Engine: 4-stroke outboard, approx 25-30 knots top speed
  • Departure point: Puerto Banús
  • Licence: Required to take the helm (8 m is above Spain's 5 m licence-free limit) — skippered departures on request
  • Price: From €230 for 2 hours (fuel not included)

What is included in your Dubhe charter

Every Dubhe charter includes everything you need for a great afternoon: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Fuel is the only extra (typically €30–€60 depending on route). You just show up, get a quick 10-minute marina briefing, and head out.

Best routes for an afternoon from Puerto Banús

From Puerto Banús, head east along the Golden Mile towards Marbella Marina and Cabopino. The coastline is dotted with coves like Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés, perfect for a quick swim stop. Alternatively, go west towards Estepona and Sotogrande for a longer cruise. The Dubhe is nimble enough to explore shallow bays and anchor near the beach.

How to book the Dubhe

Booking is simple. Contact us via WhatsApp for availability, longer durations, or any questions. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance, especially during peak summer months. You can also explore our full fleet on the Boat Rental Marbella homepage.

Who is the Dubhe for?

The Dubhe is perfect for couples, small families, or a group of friends who want a private, low-key experience. It is not suitable for large parties (max 5 people) or those wanting a luxury yacht experience — for that, check the Mangusta 80. But for a quick, affordable adventure, the Dubhe is unmatched.

Compare the Dubhe with other small boats in Marbella

There are very few boats this affordable in Marbella. The Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) also departs from Puerto Banús in a similar size bracket. The Dubhe stands alone as the cheapest hull in our fleet — if you want the lowest-priced way onto the water, this is it.

Frequently asked questions

Do I need a boat licence to drive the Dubhe?

The Dubhe is 8 metres, which is above Spain's 5 m licence-free limit, so a valid boating licence (PNB/PER, ICC or RYA Day Skipper) is needed to take the helm. No licence? Message us on WhatsApp and we will arrange a skippered departure.

How many people can the Dubhe take?

The Dubhe has a maximum capacity of 5 passengers including the driver. It is an 8-metre boat, perfect for a small group of friends or family.

What is included in the price for the Dubhe?

Every charter includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Fuel is not included on the Dubhe (typically €30–€60 depending on route). Prices start at €230 for 2 hours.

Where does the Dubhe depart from?

The Dubhe departs from Puerto Banús, the iconic marina in Marbella. You'll meet us at the dock and we'll get you on the water quickly.

Can I extend the charter beyond 2 hours?

Yes, longer durations are available. You can book for half-day or full-day trips. Contact us via WhatsApp for pricing and availability for longer hire.

What areas can I visit with the Dubhe?

You can explore the Marbella coastline, including the Golden Mile, Cabopino, and even head towards Estepona. The boat is nimble and ideal for coastal cruising. Always stay within safe navigation limits.

Is there a minimum age to drive the Dubhe?

You must be at least 18 years old to take the helm, sign a waiver and provide a valid ID plus a valid boating licence. Skippered departures are available on request.

What happens if the weather is bad?

Your safety is our priority. If weather conditions are unsafe, we will reschedule your booking or offer a full refund. We monitor forecasts closely before every departure.
